Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/search/drug?name=Botox" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'  {r[\"payer_name\"]} | {r[\"drug_name\"]} | {r[\"indication_name\"]} | {r[\"coverage_status\"]} | PA:{r[\"pa_required\"]}') for r in d[:5]]; print(f'  ... {len(d)} total results')")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/search/indication?name=cervical+dystonia" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'  {r[\"payer_name\"]} | {r[\"drug_name\"]} | {r[\"coverage_status\"]}') for r in d]")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/search/pa-requirements?drug=Myobloc" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'  {r[\"payer_name\"]} | {r[\"indication_name\"]} | PA:{r[\"pa_required\"]} | steps:{r[\"step_therapy\"]}') for r in d[:5]]")
